description: Coulson revives and reunites with the team on Zephyr One. Sousa awakens after being tranquilized and learns from Coulson and Mack that his own historical death has been faked. The truth about S.H.I.E.L.D., time travel, and the broader fight against the Chronicoms is revealed, with Sousa coming to terms with his new reality and joining the team in their uncertain next jump through time.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: It felt good to dry out. It felt good to be back on the plane. It was going to feel even better when my system was restored to...
How's that?
Better. Thanks.
And you're not still hearing it?
Internal monologue's gone. Everything's back to normal. Whatever... that is.
I get nothing off of him. Time to buckle up.
You left this behind.
Thanks.
You okay?
Yeah, just got a good look at the status quo. Not a fan.
Well, maybe next time we have the chance to change it, we do.
I'm in.
Here we go. Wish we didn't have to leave Enoch.
Me, too, but he's 3,000 miles away. He's a Chronicom, though. So he'll be wherever we're headed to next, which I hope is home.
Ow. What did you shoot me with?
An ICER. It hasn't been invented yet.
S.H.I.E.L.D.
Future S.H.I.E.L.D. We're in a fight against body-snatching robots from another planet who want to wipe us out and take the Earth. The melting man you saw was one of them.
Why didn't you lead with that?
Do I really have to answer?
You'd be surprised what I've seen.
I sort of doubt that. We weren't sure how to handle your situation.
What's my situation?
You're dead.
I don't feel so hot, but I know I'm not dead.
Well, history says you are. You were shot after delivering that gadget. I can show you the files. You're a hero. So, congrats, and... condolences.
I'm not dead.

We didn't change history, we just took you out of it, faked your death. You're alive, literally, but to anyone not on this plane, you were killed at that hotel. I'm sorry. Welcome to life after death. I'll tell you all about it.
This plane, it's how you time travel?
Yep.
So the bump that woke me up... Let me guess, we're not in 1955 anymore.
Nope.
Then... when are we?
We're trying to figure that out.
